---
title: "AXL-PD1"
output: html_document
date: "2024-06-05"
---

##Setting Up Libraries, globals and sources
```{r}

  DATA_DIR_PATH <- file.path(BASE_DIR_PATH, "data")
  
  
  source(file.path(BASE_DIR_PATH, "src/requirements.R"))

  for(file in list.files(path = file.path(BASE_DIR_PATH, "src/utils") ,full.names = TRUE)) {
    source(file)
  }
  
  library(Seurat)
  library(SeuratWrappers)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(tibble)
  library(miceadds)
  library(TCGAbiolinks)
  library(ggplot2)
```


##Find Markers and consturct signature matrix
```{r}
Idents(pbmc) <- pbmc$cell_type
markers_presto <- RunPrestoAll(pbmc)
top_markers <- markers_presto %>% group_by(cluster) %>% top_n(n=50, wt = auc) %>% ungroup()

cell_types <- unique(top_markers$cluster)

signature_matrix_list <- list()

for (cl in cell_types) {
  # Removing the cells without cell-type
  if (cl == cell_types[13]) {
    next
  }
  # Get the top markers for the current cluster
  cluster_markers <- top_markers %>%
    filter(cluster == cl) %>%
    pull(gene)
  
  # Subset the Seurat object to the cells in the current cluster
  cells_in_cluster <- WhichCells(pbmc, idents = cl)
  subset_seurat <- subset(pbmc, cells = cells_in_cluster)
  
  # Extract the average expression of the marker genes for the current cluster
  avg_expression <- AverageExpression(subset_seurat, features = cluster_markers, return.seurat = FALSE)
  
  # Convert the average expression to a data frame
  avg_expression_df <- as.data.frame(avg_expression$RNA) %>%
    rownames_to_column(var = "gene") %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = -gene, names_to = "cell_type", values_to = "avg_expression") %>%
    mutate(cell_type = cl)
  
  # Add the average expression data frame to the list
  signature_matrix_list[[cl]] <- avg_expression_df
}

# Combine all the average expression data frames into a single data frame
combined_df <- bind_rows(signature_matrix_list)

# Spread the data frame to create the signature matrix
signature_matrix <- combined_df %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = cell_type, values_from = avg_expression, values_fill = list(avg_expression = 0)) %>%
  column_to_rownames(var="gene")

signature_matrix_path = file.path(OUTPUT_DIR_PATH, "signature_matrix.txt")
write.table(signature_matrix, file = signature_matrix_path, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = TRUE, col.names = TRUE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")

signature.mtx.zscore = my.scale.zscore(signature_matrix, scale.by="rows")
heatmap <- pheatmap(signature.mtx.zscore, cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_cols =FALSE, show_rownames = FALSE)
```


##BioPortalData For TCGA clone
```{r}
  if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")
BiocManager::install("cBioPortalData")
BiocManager::install("AnVIL")

library(cBioPortalData)
library(AnVIL)
library(ggplot2)

# Initialize the cBioPortal connection
cbio <- cBioPortal()
studies <- getStudies(cbio)
study_ids <- c("brca_tcga", "acc_tcga", "skcm_tcga", "lusc_tcga", "hnsc_tcga")

process_study <- function (study_id) {
  cat("Processing study:", study_id, "\n")
  study_data <- cBioDataPack(study_id)
  study_assay <- assay(study_data, "mrna_seq_v2_rsem")
  counts_mtx <- round(study_assay)
  clinical_data <- colData(study_data)

  # Process the data
  patient_barcodes <- gsub("\\-01$", "", colnames(counts_mtx))
  colnames(counts_mtx) <- patient_barcodes
  
  # Ensure AXL is present in the dataset
  if ("AXL" %in% rownames(counts_mtx)) {
    axl_expression <- counts_mtx["AXL", patient_barcodes]
    combined_data_list <- list(
      PATIENT_ID = patient_barcodes,
      AXL_EXPRESSION = axl_expression
    )

# List of possible fields to check and plot against AXL_EXPRESSION
fields_to_check <- c("GRADE", "CLINICAL_STAGE", "AJCC_PATHOLOGIC_TUMOR_STAGE")

# Loop through the fields to check if they exist and add them to the data frame
for (field in fields_to_check) {
  if (field %in% colnames(clinical_data)) {
    # Dynamically add the field to the data frame
    field_data <- clinical_data[[field]][match(patient_barcodes, clinical_data$PATIENT_ID)]
    
    # Replace placeholder values (e.g., "[Not Applicable]") with NA
    field_data[field_data == "[Not Applicable]"] <- NA
    
    # Add the cleaned field data to the list
    combined_data_list[[field]] <- field_data
    
    # Convert the list to a data frame for plotting
    combined_data <- as.data.frame(combined_data_list)
    
    # Remove rows with NA values for the current field
    plot_data <- combined_data[!is.na(combined_data[[field]]), ]
    
    # Plot AXL_EXPRESSION against the current field if there are valid values
    if (nrow(plot_data) > 0) {
      p <- gg.box.plot.with.names(plot_data,
                                  category.x.col = field,
                                  quantitative.y.col = "AXL_EXPRESSION",
                                  title = paste("AXL Expression By", field),
                                  point.size = 0.5,
                                  jitter.factor = 1,
                                  is.print.label = FALSE)
      print(p)  # Print the plot
    } else {
      cat("No valid data to plot for", field, "\n")
    }
  }
}
  } else {
    cat("AXL gene not found in study:", study_id, "\n")
  }
}

for (study_id in study_ids) {
  process_study(study_id)  
}
```


##Prepare & Run CIBERSORTx
```{r}
source(file.path(BASE_DIR_PATH, "src/07.CYBERSORTx/CIBERSORT.R"))

#Remove duplicated rows from the mixture (keep one copy of each gene)
counts_mtx_without_duplicated_rows = counts_mtx[!duplicated(rownames(counts_mtx)), ]
counts_matrix_path = file.path(OUTPUT_DIR_PATH, "counts_matrix.txt")

write.table(counts_mtx_without_duplicated_rows, file = counts_matrix_path, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = TRUE, col.names = TRUE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")

CIBERSORT_res <- CIBERSORT(signature_matrix_path, counts_matrix_path)
CIBERSORT.res.only.celltypes <- CIBERSORT_res[,cell_types]
CIBERSORT.res.only.celltypes <- CIBERSORT.res.only.celltypes[,colnames(CIBERSORT.res.only.celltypes) != "P-value"]

```

```{r}
cbio <- cBioPortal()
studies <- getStudies(cbio)
study_ids <- c("brca_tcga", "acc_tcga", "skcm_tcga", "lusc_tcga", "hnsc_tcga")

process_study <- function (study_id) {
  cat("Processing study:", study_id, "\n")
  study_data <- cBioDataPack(study_id)
  study_assay <- assay(study_data, "mrna_seq_v2_rsem")
  counts_mtx <- round(study_assay)
  clinical_data <- colData(study_data)

  # Process the data
  patient_barcodes <- gsub("\\-01$", "", colnames(counts_mtx))
  colnames(counts_mtx) <- patient_barcodes
  ...
}
```

```{r}
TCGA.available <- c("ACC", "BRCA", "BLCA", "CESC", "CHOL", "COAD",
                    "ESCA", "GBM", "HNSC", "KICH", "KIRC", "KIRP", "LGG",
                    "LIHC", "LUAD", "LUSC", "PAAD", "PCPG", "PRAD", "READ",
                    "SKCM", "SARC", "STAD", "THCA", "UCEC", "UCS", "UVM")

# Initialize a list to store results
tcga_study_max_cases <- list()

# Iterate over each TCGA code
for (code in TCGA.available) {
  # Retrieve all studies
  studies <- getStudies(cbio)
  
  # Filter studies by code in lowercase followed by an underscore
  code_pattern <- paste0("(^", tolower(code), "_|_", tolower(code), "_)")
  relevant_studies <- subset(studies, grepl(code_pattern, studies$studyId))
  
  # Check if there are relevant studies
  if (nrow(relevant_studies) > 0) {
    # Find the study with the maximum case count
    max_case_study <- relevant_studies[which.max(relevant_studies$allSampleCount), ]
    
    # Store result for this TCGA code
    tcga_study_max_cases[[code]] <- list(
      studyId = max_case_study$studyId,
      allSampleCount = max_case_study$allSampleCount
    )
  } else {
    message(paste("No studies found for code:", code))
  }
}

# Display results
tcga_study_max_cases
```
